TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == To'asan ponka no 'Amis == O maan ko to'asan ponka no 'Amis a finacadan? Ira ko paretatengaay a tamdaw "o pidemak to lisin no finacadan, o pinangan no pakayraan, pahapinang to no kacingangan no finacadan" saan, so'elinay to kinasowal, o sakasaan o maanan ko to'asan ponka no 'Amis finacadan? Sarakatay, 'aywen ita misolimet ko tatodong no "ponka" hananay. sacisowal sa ci E. B.Taylor to nitilidan ningra i 1971 miheca a tilid, ano sarahodayen ko pisetek to ponka, sowal sa: "o ponka ano eca serareci o kasasifodan a todong, halo fana', nipaso'elinan, nakamayan pinasanga', kacingodo, rikec, lakakawa, ato sakadademak no syakay a tekedan to sakairaaw ato kananaman" saan. orasaka, rahodayen ko sowal, o ponka haw i oya "nano liyokay no syakay a niketonan "pidoedoan no saka'orip" a nikapolongan". Ano macangalen to nisowalan i honi masasowalanay, saki titaanan o yincumin a ponka masarocoday masilsil ko pahapinang. Madotoc toya nisowalan i honi a ponka, manga'ay ita masilsil ko ponka no yincumin: 1. Nakamayan: pisaloma', losid, to'eto', kawit (wikwik, kared), misakoreng (kapowa), tesel, tilid, sinalit. 2. Sakapot: salaloma'an, salawinawina (misa'alingayay no ina), sangasaway, saniyaro'ay, masaselalay, patireng to mitomadaway . 3. Pakayraan ato nipaso'elinan: Cikawasay harateng, serayan harateng, saki'oripan, ilisin, sacopo', sapisalisin, lisin, cikawasay ano eca palolo'ay ato roma kakawa. 4.Sakedec: Halo rikec, sakingodo lekakawa, sakacihaher harateng, to'asan, kakawa, sapikedec to pinangan no tamdaw, sakadadoedo no syakan. 5.Fana': Pakisowal a mirayray to noto'asan a taneng, fenek, likisi, kimad no kawakawasan, kimad, papelo a ratoh, somalakaw a sapirayray i teloc. 6.Saka'orip: Paloma to hafay, macacofaliw ko Paloma, facalay Paloma, mapapaliway Paloma, mifoting, misanga' to talakal, malali'acaay to dafong. 7.Laola: finacadan a olic, radiwan a kero, sakilisin a folod, katatawaan a sowal, liso' maainiini, ngasaw a pinaol, masasipapelo, sasalamaen no kaemangay. 8.Sowal: Pakangiha no sowal, pinangan, kamay, tatirengan a sowal ko sakalalicay, paratoh to niyah a niharatengan. Pakayni i ponka no yibcumin a masapinang ko kasasiiked mahapinang, manengneng ko demak no ilisin o cecay no "pakayraan no paso'elinan" a lisin, patiyol to to'asan a ilisin, oya sakingodo a sakedec, mapatireng ko kacingangan no 'Amis? Mato pangtaay ko paini, ano eca "palalefodan nanay" a herateng ko pidemak. O pakayraan no ilisin o nai pipalomaan to hafay a miteka ko todong no sakacilisin, talacowa caay to pipaloma to hafay, nika oya to ko pidemak to ilisin; tayra to i tokay caay to pipaloma, nika midemak to kailisin, nawhani o pahapinang piahowid to kawas ko pidemak to ilisin. Malecad to, caay to paso'elinen ita ko no to'asan a pakayraan a kawas, caay to paso'elin to piadah no cikawasay to adada, nika midemak kita to ilisin. Talacowa masasiroma to ko pidemak to ilisin, nika pahecian no ilisin caay to kafalic, midemak to ilisin pasikawas ko piahowid no mita, romadiw a masakero. Caay ka dengan o kasasifod ko pateporan no ponka. Pakayni haca i kasasiromaroma to no romi'ad a mafalic. Ta'asan ponka no 'Amis ira ko sakalalaed to no anini ni'oripan no yincumin, matiya o madi'etocay. Masasiroma to ko wayway no ponka, nika salaloma'an pahecian no ponka caay to kafalic. O misarocodan no mita a oya to koya pahecian no ponka itiya, caay ko wayway no ponka ko nihaenan. Onini ko sasi'ayawen a mafana' ato pinangan a minengneng to ponka no niyah. Mitiliday ci Cilo singsi ==== Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar ====
S.PHON: == to~u °asan po~unka no~u °amis == o~u maan ko~u to~u °asan po~unka no~u °amis a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan? ira ko~u par…ôtat…ôŇčaaj a tam…¨~…ģaw "o~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u …ĺisin no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, o~u pinaŇčan no~u pakajraan, pańßapinaŇč to~u no~u ka ¶iŇčaŇčan no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan" saan, so~u °…ô…ĺinaj to~u kinaso~uwa…ĺ, o~u sakasaan o~u maanan ko~u to~u °asan po~unka no~u °amis fina ¶a…¨~…ģan? sarakataj, °ajw…ôn ita miso~u…ĺim…ôt ko~u tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u "po~unka" ńßananaj. sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa ¶i …ô. b~b~v.taj…ĺo~ur to~u niti…ĺi…¨~…ģan niŇčra i **** mińß…ô ¶a a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, ano~u sarańßo~u…¨~…ģaj…ôn ko~u pis…ôt…ôk to~u po~unka, so~uwa…ĺ sa: "o~u po~unka ano~u …ô ¶a s…ôrar…ô ¶i o~u kasasifo~u…¨~…ģan a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč, ńßa…ĺo~u fana °, nipaso~u °…ô…ĺinan, nakamajan pinasaŇča °, ka ¶iŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~u, rik…ô ¶, …ĺakakawa, ato~u saka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak no~u sjakaj a t…ôk…ô…¨~…ģan to~u sakairaaw ato~u kananaman" saan. o~urasaka, rańßo~u…¨~…ģaj…ôn ko~u so~uwa…ĺ, o~u po~unka ńßaw i o~uja "nano~u …ĺijo~ukaj no~u sjakaj a nik…ôto~unan "pi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~uan no~u saka °o~urip" a nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan". ano~u ma ¶aŇča…ĺ…ôn to~u niso~uwa…ĺan i ńßo~uni masaso~uwa…ĺanaj, saki titaanan o~u jin ¶o~u~umin a po~unka masaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģaj masi…ĺsi…ĺ ko~u pańßapinaŇč. ma…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ to~uja niso~uwa…ĺan i ńßo~uni a po~unka, maŇča °aj ita masi…ĺsi…ĺ ko~u po~unka no~u jin ¶o~u~umin: *. nakamajan: pisa…ĺo~uma °, …ĺo~usi…¨~…ģ, to~u °…ôto~u °, kawit (wikwik, kar…ô…¨~…ģ), misako~ur…ôŇč (kapo~uwa), t…ôs…ô…ĺ, ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, sina…ĺit. *. sakapo~ut: sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °an, sa…ĺawinawina (misa °a…ĺiŇčajaj no~u ina), saŇčasawaj, sanijaro~u °aj, masas…ô…ĺa…ĺaj, patir…ôŇč to~u mito~uma…¨~…ģawaj . *. pakajraan ato~u nipaso~u °…ô…ĺinan: ¶ikawasaj ńßarat…ôŇč, s…ôrajan ńßarat…ôŇč, saki °o~uripan, i…ĺisin, sa ¶o~upo~u °, sapisa…ĺisin, …ĺisin, ¶ikawasaj ano~u …ô ¶a pa…ĺo~u…ĺo~u °aj ato~u ro~uma kakawa. *.sak…ô…¨~…ģ…ô ¶: ńßa…ĺo~u rik…ô ¶, sakiŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~u …ĺ…ôkakawa, saka ¶ińßańß…ôr ńßarat…ôŇč, mapapa…ĺiwaj pa…ĺo~uma, mifo~utiŇč, misaŇča ° to~u ta…ĺaka…ĺ, ma…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aaj to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč. *.…ĺao~u…ĺa: fina ¶a…¨~…ģan a o~u…ĺi ¶, ra…¨~…ģiwan a k…ôro~u, saki…ĺisin a fo~u…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ, katatawaan a so~uwa…ĺ, …ĺiso~u ° maainiini, Ňčasaw a pinao~u…ĺ, masasipap…ô…ĺo~u, sasa…ĺama…ôn no~u ka…ômaŇčaj. *.so~uwa…ĺ: pakaŇčińßa no~u so~uwa…ĺ, pinaŇčan, kamaj, tatir…ôŇčan a so~uwa…ĺ ko~u saka…ĺa…ĺi ¶aj, parato~uńß to~u nijańß a nińßarat…ôŇčan. pakajni i po~unka no~u jib~b~v ¶o~u~umin a masapinaŇč ko~u kasasiik…ô…¨~…ģ mańßapinaŇč, man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u i…ĺisin o~u ¶…ô ¶aj no~u "pakajraan "pa…ĺa…ĺ…ôfo~u…¨~…ģan nanaj" a ńß…ôrat…ôŇč ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak. o~u pakajraan no~u i…ĺisin o~u nai pipa…ĺo~umaan to~u ńßafaj a mit…ôka ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u saka ¶i…ĺisin, ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶aaj to~u pipa…ĺo~uma to~u ńßafaj, nika o~uja to~u ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u i…ĺisin; tajra to~u i to~ukaj ¶aaj to~u pipa…ĺo~uma, nika mi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u kai…ĺisin, nawńßani o~u pańßapinaŇč piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ to~u kawas ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u i…ĺisin. ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u, ¶aaj to~u paso~u °…ô…ĺin…ôn ita ko~u no~u to~u °asan a pakajraan a kawas, ¶aaj to~u paso~u °…ô…ĺin to~u pia…¨~…ģańß no~u ¶ikawasaj to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa, nika mi…¨~…ģ…ômak kita to~u i…ĺisin. ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa masasiro~uma to~u ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u i…ĺisin, nika pańß…ô ¶ian no~u i…ĺisin ¶aaj to~u kafa…ĺi ¶, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u i…ĺisin pasikawas ko~u piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ no~u mita, ro~uma…¨~…ģiw a masak…ôro~u. ¶aaj ka …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u kasasifo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u pat…ôpo~uran no~u po~unka. pakajni ńßa ¶a i kasasiro~umaro~uma to~u no~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ a mafa…ĺi ¶. ta °asan po~unka no~u °amis ira ko~u saka…ĺa…ĺa…ô…¨~…ģ to~u no~u anini ni °o~uripan no~u jin ¶o~u~umin, matija o~u ma…¨~…ģi °…ôto~u ¶aj. masasiro~uma to~u ko~u wajwaj no~u po~unka, nika sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °an pańß…ô ¶ian no~u po~unka ¶aaj to~u kafa…ĺi ¶. o~u misaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģan no~u mita a o~uja to~u ko~uja pańß…ô ¶ian no~u po~unka itija, ¶aaj ko~u wajwaj no~u po~unka ko~u nińßa…ônan. o~unini ko~u sasi °ajaw…ôn a mafana ° ato~u pinaŇčan a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u po~unka no~u nijańß. miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj ¶i ¶i…ĺo~u siŇčsi ==== mifa…ĺi ¶aj ¶i masao~u nikar ====
S.FORM: == To'asan ponka no 'Amis == O maan ko to'asan ponka no 'Amis a finacadan? Ira ko paretatengaay a tamdaw "o pidemak to lisin no finacadan, o pinangan no pakayraan, pahapinang to no kacingangan no finacadan" saan, so'elinay to kinasowal, o sakasaan o maanan ko to'asan ponka no 'Amis finacadan? Sarakatay, 'aywen ita misolimet ko tatodong no "ponka" hananay. sacisowal sa ci E. B.Taylor to nitilidan ningra i 1971 miheca a tilid, ano sarahodayen ko pisetek to ponka, sowal sa: "o ponka ano eca serareci o kasasifodan a todong, halo fana', nipaso'elinan, nakamayan pinasanga', kacingodo, rikec, lakakawa, ato sakadademak no syakay a tekedan to sakairaaw ato kananaman" saan. orasaka, rahodayen ko sowal, o ponka haw i oya "nano liyokay no syakay a niketonan "pidoedoan no saka'orip" a nikapolongan". Ano macangalen to nisowalan i honi masasowalanay, saki titaanan o yincumin a ponka masarocoday masilsil ko pahapinang. Madotoc toya nisowalan i honi a ponka, manga'ay ita masilsil ko ponka no yincumin: 1. Nakamayan: pisaloma', losid, to'eto', kawit (wikwik, kared), misakoreng (kapowa), tesel, tilid, sinalit. 2. Sakapot: salaloma'an, salawinawina (misa'alingayay no ina), sangasaway, saniyaro'ay, masaselalay, patireng to mitomadaway . 3. Pakayraan ato nipaso'elinan: Cikawasay harateng, serayan harateng, saki'oripan, ilisin, sacopo', sapisalisin, lisin, cikawasay ano eca palolo'ay ato roma kakawa. 4.Sakedec: Halo rikec, sakingodo lekakawa, sakacihaher harateng, to'asan, kakawa, sapikedec to pinangan no tamdaw, sakadadoedo no syakan. 5.Fana': Pakisowal a mirayray to noto'asan a taneng, fenek, likisi, kimad no kawakawasan, kimad, papelo a ratoh, somalakaw a sapirayray i teloc. 6.Saka'orip: Paloma to hafay, macacofaliw ko Paloma, facalay Paloma, mapapaliway Paloma, mifoting, misanga' to talakal, malali'acaay to dafong. 7.Laola: finacadan a olic, radiwan a kero, sakilisin a folod, katatawaan a sowal, liso' maainiini, ngasaw a pinaol, masasipapelo, sasalamaen no kaemangay. 8.Sowal: Pakangiha no sowal, pinangan, kamay, tatirengan a sowal ko sakalalicay, paratoh to niyah a niharatengan. Pakayni i ponka no yibcumin a masapinang ko kasasiiked mahapinang, manengneng ko demak no ilisin o cecay no "pakayraan no paso'elinan" a lisin, patiyol to to'asan a ilisin, oya sakingodo a sakedec, mapatireng ko kacingangan no 'Amis? Mato pangtaay ko paini, ano eca "palalefodan nanay" a herateng ko pidemak. O pakayraan no ilisin o nai pipalomaan to hafay a miteka ko todong no sakacilisin, talacowa caay to pipaloma to hafay, nika oya to ko pidemak to ilisin; tayra to i tokay caay to pipaloma, nika midemak to kailisin, nawhani o pahapinang piahowid to kawas ko pidemak to ilisin. Malecad to, caay to paso'elinen ita ko no to'asan a pakayraan a kawas, caay to paso'elin to piadah no cikawasay to adada, nika midemak kita to ilisin. Talacowa masasiroma to ko pidemak to ilisin, nika pahecian no ilisin caay to kafalic, midemak to ilisin pasikawas ko piahowid no mita, romadiw a masakero. Caay ka dengan o kasasifod ko pateporan no ponka. Pakayni haca i kasasiromaroma to no romi'ad a mafalic. Ta'asan ponka no 'Amis ira ko sakalalaed to no anini ni'oripan no yincumin, matiya o madi'etocay. Masasiroma to ko wayway no ponka, nika salaloma'an pahecian no ponka caay to kafalic. O misarocodan no mita a oya to koya pahecian no ponka itiya, caay ko wayway no ponka ko nihaenan. Onini ko sasi'ayawen a mafana' ato pinangan a minengneng to ponka no niyah. Mitiliday ci Cilo singsi ==== Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar ====

pinaŇčan no~u pakajraan, pańßapinaŇč to~u no~u ka ¶iŇčaŇčan no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan" saan, so~u °…ô…ĺinaj to~u kinaso~uwa…ĺ, o~u sakasaan o~u maanan ko~u to~u °asan po~unka no~u °amis fina ¶a…¨~…ģan? sarakataj, °ajw…ôn ita miso~u…ĺim…ôt ko~u tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u "po~unka" ńßananaj. sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa ¶i …ô. b~b~v.taj…ĺo~ur to~u niti…ĺi…¨~…ģan niŇčra i **** mińß…ô ¶a a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, ano~u sarańßo~u…¨~…ģaj…ôn ko~u pis…ôt…ôk to~u po~unka, so~uwa…ĺ sa: "o~u po~unka ano~u …ô ¶a s…ôrar…ô ¶i o~u kasasifo~u…¨~…ģan a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč, ńßa…ĺo~u fana °, nipaso~u °…ô…ĺinan, nakamajan pinasaŇča °, o~uja "nano~u …ĺijo~ukaj no~u sjakaj a nik…ôto~unan "pi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~uan no~u saka °o~urip" a nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan". ano~u ma ¶aŇča…ĺ…ôn to~u niso~uwa…ĺan i ńßo~uni masaso~uwa…ĺanaj, saki titaanan o~u jin ¶o~u~umin a po~unka masaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģaj masi…ĺsi…ĺ ko~u pańßapinaŇč. ma…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ to~uja niso~uwa…ĺan i ńßo~uni a po~unka, maŇča °aj ita masi…ĺsi…ĺ ko~u po~unka no~u jin ¶o~u~umin: *. nakamajan: pisa…ĺo~uma °, …ĺo~usi…¨~…ģ, to~u °…ôto~u °, kawit (wikwik, kar…ô…¨~…ģ), misako~ur…ôŇč (kapo~uwa), t…ôs…ô…ĺ, ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, sina…ĺit. *. sakapo~ut: sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °an, sa…ĺawinawina (misa °a…ĺiŇčajaj no~u ina), saŇčasawaj, sanijaro~u °aj, masas…ô…ĺa…ĺaj, patir…ôŇč to~u mito~uma…¨~…ģawaj . *. pakajraan ato~u nipaso~u °…ô…ĺinan: ¶ikawasaj ńßarat…ôŇč, s…ôrajan ńßarat…ôŇč, saki °o~uripan, i…ĺisin, sa ¶o~upo~u °, sapisa…ĺisin, …ĺisin, ¶ikawasaj ano~u …ô ¶a pa…ĺo~u…ĺo~u °aj ato~u ro~uma kakawa. *.sak…ô…¨~…ģ…ô ¶: ńßa…ĺo~u rik…ô ¶, sakiŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~u …ĺ…ôkakawa, saka ¶ińßańß…ôr ńßarat…ôŇč, to~u °asan, kakawa, sapik…ô…¨~…ģ…ô ¶ to~u pinaŇčan no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, saka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u no~u sjakan. *.fana °: pakiso~uwa…ĺ a mirajraj to~u no~uto~u °asan a tan…ôŇč, f…ôn…ôk, …ĺikisi, kima…¨~…ģ no~u kawakawasan, kima…¨~…ģ, pap…ô…ĺo~u a rato~uńß, so~uma…ĺakaw a sapirajraj i t…ô…ĺo~u ¶. *.saka °o~urip: pa…ĺo~uma to~u ńßafaj, ma ¶a ¶o~ufa…ĺiw ko~u pa…ĺo~uma, fa ¶a…ĺaj pa…ĺo~uma, mapapa…ĺiwaj pa…ĺo~uma, mifo~utiŇč, misaŇča ° to~u ta…ĺaka…ĺ, ma…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aaj to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč. *.…ĺao~u…ĺa: fina ¶a…¨~…ģan a o~u…ĺi ¶, ra…¨~…ģiwan a k…ôro~u, saki…ĺisin a fo~u…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ, katatawaan a so~uwa…ĺ, …ĺiso~u ° maainiini, Ňčasaw a pinao~u…ĺ, masasipap…ô…ĺo~u, sasa…ĺama…ôn no~u ka…ômaŇčaj. *.so~uwa…ĺ: pakaŇčińßa no~u so~uwa…ĺ, pinaŇčan, kamaj, tatir…ôŇčan a so~uwa…ĺ ko~u saka…ĺa…ĺi ¶aj, parato~uńß to~u nijańß a nińßarat…ôŇčan. pakajni i po~unka no~u jib~b~v ¶o~u~umin a masapinaŇč ko~u kasasiik…ô…¨~…ģ mańßapinaŇč, man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u i…ĺisin o~u ¶…ô ¶aj no~u "pakajraan no~u paso~u °…ô…ĺinan" a …ĺisin, patijo~u…ĺ to~u to~u °asan a i…ĺisin, o~uja sakiŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~u a sak…ô…¨~…ģ…ô ¶, mapatir…ôŇč ko~u ka ¶iŇčaŇčan no~u °amis? mato~u paŇčtaaj ko~u paini, ano~u …ô ¶a "pa…ĺa…ĺ…ôfo~u…¨~…ģan nanaj" a ńß…ôrat…ôŇč ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak. o~u pakajraan no~u i…ĺisin o~u nai pipa…ĺo~umaan to~u ńßafaj a mit…ôka ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u saka ¶i…ĺisin, ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶aaj to~u pipa…ĺo~uma to~u ńßafaj, nika o~uja to~u ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u i…ĺisin; tajra to~u i to~ukaj ¶aaj to~u pipa…ĺo~uma, nika mi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u kai…ĺisin, nawńßani o~u pańßapinaŇč piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ to~u kawas ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u i…ĺisin. ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u, ¶aaj to~u paso~u °…ô…ĺin…ôn ita ko~u no~u to~u °asan a pakajraan a kawas, ¶aaj to~u paso~u °…ô…ĺin to~u pia…¨~…ģańß no~u ¶ikawasaj to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa, nika mi…¨~…ģ…ômak kita to~u i…ĺisin. ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa masasiro~uma to~u ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u i…ĺisin, nika pańß…ô ¶ian no~u i…ĺisin ¶aaj to~u kafa…ĺi ¶, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u i…ĺisin pasikawas ko~u piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ no~u mita, ro~uma…¨~…ģiw a masak…ôro~u. ¶aaj ka …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u kasasifo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u pat…ôpo~uran no~u po~unka. pakajni ńßa ¶a i kasasiro~umaro~uma to~u no~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ a mafa…ĺi ¶. ta °asan po~unka no~u °amis ira ko~u saka…ĺa…ĺa…ô…¨~…ģ to~u no~u anini ni °o~uripan no~u jin ¶o~u~umin, matija o~u ma…¨~…ģi °…ôto~u ¶aj. masasiro~uma to~u ko~u wajwaj no~u po~unka, nika sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °an pańß…ô ¶ian no~u po~unka ¶aaj to~u kafa…ĺi ¶. o~u misaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģan no~u mita a o~uja to~u ko~uja pańß…ô ¶ian no~u po~unka itija, ¶aaj ko~u wajwaj no~u po~unka ko~u nińßa…ônan. o~unini ko~u sasi °ajaw…ôn a mafana ° ato~u pinaŇčan a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u po~unka no~u nijańß. miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj ¶i ¶i…ĺo~u siŇčsi ==== mifa…ĺi ¶aj ¶i masao~u nikar ====
